html:
Exclusive to:  

Mini Glaciers are naturally occurring objects found in the Reign of Giants DLC. When mined, they will drop Ice and Rocks. Mini Glaciers are only at their fullest during the Winter and will begin to melt in the Spring. By Summer, all that will be left is a puddle of water, and the player will have to wait until Autumn for them to slowly begin to freeze again. If exposed to a heat source (such as a Campfire) Mini glaciers will melt, reducing down to the puddle state. Once the heat source is gone, and if the ambient temperature is low enough, the Mini Glacier will freeze again. It will return to the maximum state allowed by the current temperature. When mined, Mini Glaciers make a different sound from boulders.

Additionally, Mini Glaciers will appear next to Pengull breeding grounds during Winter, making them a renewable resource.

Gallery

  • Mini Glacier on water in DST
  • A Mini Glacier half way through its growing stage.
  • Two large Mini Glaciers just starting to melt.
  • A Melted Mini Glacier.
  • Mini Glaciers in a Rockyland biome.
  • Mini Glaciers spawn around Pengull grounds in winter.
  • Fireflies inside a Mini Glacier.
  • A glitch that occurs when pengulls base too close to the ocean.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"rock_ice"
“A very isolated glacier.”
–Wilson
“I don't think there's any way it'd burn.”
–Willow
“Rocks made of water.”
–Wolfgang
“A large piece of cold, unfeeling ice.”
–Wendy
“I REQUIRE AN ICEBREAKER”
–WX-78
“A small block of extremely dense ice.”
–Wickerbottom
“Home sweet home!”
–Woodie
“I could get a chip of ice off the old block.”
–Maxwell
“Unusual how these ice formations appear in vast numbers.”
–Wagstaff
“A miniature frözen möuntain.”
–Wigfrid
“Ice can be useful.”
–Webber
“At least someone around here knows how to chill!”
–Walani
“Brr!”
–Warly
“Better here than 'neath me boat tearin' at her hull.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS MOUND OF FRIGID ICE.”
–Wilba
“Big, cold rock”
–Wormwood
“Reminds me of my days exploring the Arctic.”
–Wheeler
“A weirdly isolated glacier.”
–Winona
“Who knew water could do that!”
–Wortox
“Brrr, that cold on scales!”
–Wurt
“This will really give you the chills.”
–Walter
“A frozen chunk of future water.”
–Wanda
Mini Glaciers are naturally occurring objects found in the Reign of Giants DLC. When mined, they will drop Ice and Rocks. Mini Glaciers are only at their fullest during the Winter and will begin to melt in the Spring. By Summer, all that will be left is a puddle of water, and the player will have to wait until Autumn for them to slowly begin to freeze again. If exposed to a heat source (such as a Campfire) Mini glaciers will melt, reducing down to the puddle state. Once the heat source is gone, and if the ambient temperature is low enough, the Mini Glacier will freeze again. It will return to the maximum state allowed by the current temperature. When mined, Mini Glaciers make a different sound from boulders.
Additionally, Mini Glaciers will appear next to Pengull breeding grounds during Winter, making them a renewable resource.
